message:
test(bd-9chy.47): add path handling and buffering tests

Add 4 more tests for bd-9chy.47:
- fopen_long_path_accepted: paths with 200+ character filenames
- fopen_path_with_spaces_accepted: paths containing spaces
- fopen_regular_file_uses_full_buffering: verify buffering behavior
- fopen_dev_null_succeeds: special file handling

Progress: 21 of 26 tests implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
